title: Amethyst Corruption
description: Create Echo Shards by having an Allay holding an Amethyst Shard get hit by a Warden's sonic boom.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Wunm6vrOWdQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Give an Allay an Amethyst Shard. If the Allay holding the amethyst is hit by a Warden's sonic boom, the Amethyst Shard will be converted into an Echo Shard.
